memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double xmin, double xmax) const
memberdef.name: interpolate

memberdef.argsstring: (string fname, int startLine, int colNum, char separator)
memberdef.name: loadCSV

memberdef.argsstring: (string fname, string plotname, unsigned int start, unsigned int end)
memberdef.name: loadXplotRange
initCinfo
memberdef.references: OpFunc4< T, A1, A2, A3, A4 >::OpFunc4

detaileddescription.para: Base class for table operations. Provides basics for looking up table and interpolation, but no process or messaging. Derived classes deal with these.
